word: G4260 - προβαίνω - probaínō - prob-ah'-ee-no - + be of a great age

sections.paragraph: Short Definition: + be of a great age

προβαίνω - probainō - prob-ah'ee-no

From G4253 and the base of G939; to walk forward, that is, advance (literally or in years): - + be of a great age, go farther (on), be well stricken.
